---
title: Google Cloud
---

## **NWFSC GCP Buckets:** 

#### [nwfsc-1](https://console.cloud.google.com/storage/browser/nwfsc-1;tab=objects?cloudshell=true&inv=1&invt=AbrESg&project=ggn-nmfs-pamdata-prod-1&prefix=&forceOnObjectsSortingFiltering=false) : Salish Sea raw audio data

#### [nwfsc-2](https://console.cloud.google.com/storage/browser/nwfsc-2;tab=objects?cloudshell=true&inv=1&invt=AbrESg&project=ggn-nmfs-pamdata-prod-1&prefix=&forceOnObjectsSortingFiltering=false) : Coastal raw audio data
